description_long: This office building features a modern, angular design with a combination of dark glass curtain walls and light-colored structural elements. The structure is composed of two main wings joined at an angle, creating a distinctive geometric footprint. The facade is dominated by horizontal bands of windows, with the front section displaying alternating blue and white stripes. The roof is flat and includes several mechanical units and skylights, typical of commercial office buildings. The building's exterior is primarily glass and concrete, giving it a sleek, professional appearance. No visible signage or decorative elements are present, emphasizing a functional, contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, angular office building with dark glass facades, horizontal window bands, and a flat roof featuring mechanical units.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facade with blue and white horizontal stripes and a prominent glass curtain wall.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the building's angular geometry and the extensive use of dark glass panels.
description_view_2: The rear angle reveals the building's two-wing structure and the flat, utilitarian roof with mechanical features.
description_view_3: The back view displays the lighter structural elements and vertical blue accents, with minimal window openings.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular horizontal bands of rectangular windows, evenly spaced and repeated across each floor.
